overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a witch character exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks through grand halls with vaulted ceilings, descends staircases, and traverses long corridors lined with tapestries and portraits, illuminated by warm lantern light.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with double staircase

events.description: character opens large wooden door and enters the grand hall from the entrance vestibule
character begins descending the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: opening the large wooden entrance door and walking into the grand hall, then proceeding down the central staircase

entered.detail: heavy wooden entrance door with metal studs and diagonal bracing
full plate armor standing on display beside the entrance
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling with multiple candles
wide bifurcated stone staircase with red carpet runner descending to the hall
tall stone column with carved capital supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins facing a large wooden entrance door in a stone vestibule. The character opens the door and enters a grand hall featuring a bifurcated staircase, an iron chandelier, and suits of armor. The character walks forward and begins descending the stairs, with stone pillars and red carpet visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with tapestries and gothic arches

events.description: moving from the open grand hall into a narrower stone corridor with wall tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking through the great hall at the bottom of the stairs, passing large wall tapestries and gothic arches

entered.detail: large woven tapestry depicting medieval scenes hanging on the stone wall
pointed stone archway with intricate carvings leading to the next corridor
rough-hewn stone block walls of the narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the great hall at the base of the stairs, passing between stone pillars and large wall tapestries. The space transitions from the open grand hall into a narrower stone corridor with gothic archways, as the grand staircase and chandelier recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery corridor with ornate wallpaper

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long portrait gallery corridor, passing framed paintings on both sides

entered.detail: framed oil paintings in ornate gold frames hanging on the corridor walls
dark patterned wallpaper with floral designs covering the corridor walls
wall-mounted iron lantern with warm glowing light
red velvet rope on brass stanchions sectioning off parts of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, narrow portrait gallery corridor with ornate wallpaper and framed paintings lining both walls. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the path, and velvet rope barriers section off display areas. The previous hall with tapestries is left behind as the character moves deeper into the corridor.

events.description: approaching the large wooden door at the end of the portrait gallery corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the portrait gallery toward a closed wooden door at the corridor's end

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with diagonal bracing marking the end of the corridor
wooden bench with stone base positioned against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the latter half of the portrait gallery, passing more framed portraits and velvet ropes. The corridor leads toward a large wooden door at the far end, with stone benches visible along the walls. The lighting remains warm from the wall sconces as the character approaches the door.

events.description: opening the wooden door and entering the small stairwell chamber
beginning to ascend the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: opening the wooden door to enter a small chamber and climbing the stone staircase to the upper level

entered.detail: straight stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
simple wooden bench positioned against the wall in the stairwell
framed painting hanging on the wall at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character opens the wooden door at the end of the gallery and enters a smaller stone antechamber containing a straight staircase. The character approaches and begins ascending the stone stairs, passing a wooden bench and heading toward a painting hung above the stairwell, leaving the portrait gallery behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, open entrance hall through a narrow portrait gallery and into a secluded stone antechamber. It begins as the character opens a large wooden door to enter a vast hall featuring a bifurcated staircase, an iron chandelier, and suits of armor, before descending the red-carpeted stairs. As the character reaches the base, the space transitions from the open hall and its large tapestries into a narrower stone corridor defined by gothic archways. The scene then shifts into a long portrait gallery lined with ornate wallpaper, framed paintings, and velvet rope barriers illuminated by warm wall sconces. Finally, the camera moves past stone benches toward a wooden door at the end of the gallery, opening it to enter a small antechamber where the character begins ascending a straight stone staircase toward a painting on the wall.
